questionHtml: Outline the consequences of incomplete closure of the neural tube in humans.
markschemeHtml:
a. this leads to condition spina bifida ✔

b. some of the vertebrae may not form correctly
OR
incomplete closing of the backbone ✔

c. spinal cord may protrude ✔

d. «may» cause paralysis ✔

meta.title: Outline the consequences of incomplete closure of the neural tube in humans.
